periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 80. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

periods.name: Independence Day
periods.short_forecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Sunny, with a high near 99. Heat index values as high as 110. Southwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 78. Heat index values as high as 106. South wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailed_forecast: Sunny, with a high near 97. Heat index values as high as 106. South wind 6 to 9 mph.
